name: Reverse Pec Deck (Rear Delt Fly)
setup: Sit facing the machine, chest against pad
Grip handles with arms extended forward
Adjust seat so handles are at shoulder height
execution: Pull handles backward by squeezing shoulder blades
Arms stay extended, slight bend in elbows
Squeeze rear delts at full ROM
cues: Open the arms like opening a book
Squeeze rear delts at the back
